message.content:
@startuml
title Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline

participant "Smart\nProxy" as SP
participant "3Scale" as 3S
box "Insights operator" #lightgreen
participant "Control logic" as CL
participant "IO memory cache" as IMC
end box
participant "CRD" as CRD
participant "OCP\nWebConsole" as OCP

== Pulling data from Smart Proxy ==

CL -> 3S : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
3S -> SP : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
SP --> 3S : Recommendations\nfor cluster
3S --> CL : Recommendations\nfor cluster

== Exposing recommendations ==

CL -> IMC : Store\nrecommendations
IMC -> CRD : Expose\nrecommendations

== Pulling from OCP WebConsole ==

OCP -> CRD : Read\nrecommendations
CRD --> OCP : Here are\nrequired data

@enduml
